prompt: Create a wide cinematic digital illustration in the bold Red Peaks aesthetic: a low-angle fashion editorial scene on a sunlit seaside resort deck under a deep clear blue sky. Center the composition on exactly two punk-styled young adults standing confidently side by side, seen full body from below: on the left, a tall slim man with pale blond spiky pigtail hair, visible neck and leg tattoos, layered necklaces, a white T-shirt with a red target logo, oversized white shorts, red-striped white socks, yellow high-top sneakers, and a loose blue coat covered in large cream polka dots and red target patches; on the right, a tall slim woman with windblown black hair, red sunglasses, hoop earrings, tattoos, a cropped white top and white skirt or shorts, a vivid red oversized jacket with target patches, matching red-striped white socks, and yellow high-top sneakers. Include exactly two dogs: one large scruffy white terrier on the far left wearing black sunglasses, standing alert with tail raised, and one small tan dog on the far right sitting calmly on a red leash. The woman holds a small yellow soccer ball-like accessory in one hand and a phone in the other; the man casually holds a phone or small object. Surround them with a luxury beach-club setting: exactly two large umbrellas, one solid red umbrella on the left and one red-and-white striped umbrella on the right, white lounge chairs, red cushions, scattered flowers in the foreground, a bright pool or sea horizon behind them, and hints of rocky coastline and trees at far left. Use saturated red, white, blue, and yellow color blocking, crisp sunlight, strong shadows, painterly yet detailed digital brushwork, high-fashion streetwear attitude, surreal clean composition, no readable text except simple target symbols, no watermark.
